samples.content:
We stayed with @onthesandvacations at North Coast village in unit G321. This place is a DREAM! It’s straight up botanical garden vibes everywhere you look. There’s a massive pool and hot tubs and is so close to the beach. There is also not a lot of public parking close by so the beach access feels way less busy which was amazing. Our room was so comfy and such a great central location. It’s perfect for a romantic getaway, family reunion, or girls trip for SURE.

Food: we made breakfast at the condo with its stunning kitchen. There are SO many good food places nearby by if you’re there on a Thursday the Thursday night market is a must for food.

We also ate at @allmine.oceanside which blew our ever loving minds. Get the lasagna and all the pizzas were 10/10.

We went to @mellanofarmstand which was a little out of the way but it’s the cutest little farm stand where you can taste test their honey and a you pick zinnia field.

There’s also a million nurseries nearby so google one that open and close to pick up some new plant babies.

We went to a workout class, had a craft night, shopped at the mall and saw a movie after. We spent a ton of time boogie boarding, taking naps on the beach, and enjoying the condo. Honestly the best few days reconnecting with these wonderful sisters and momma of mine. 💛

samples.content:
My husband is an animal lover to his core with an especially soft spot for anything ugly. (I always joke that I dunno if I should take personal offense to this but it’s fine 😂)

We got a call from one of our besties down the street that their dog was playing with an opossum and it needed help. Matt was over there in the blink of an eye thrilled at the opportunity to hold one of these beauties. 😳

Did you know though that they play dead when they are scared? But it’s involuntary. They don’t get to choose when this happens.

They also eat ticks, have a body temperature too low to carry rabies, and are natures clean up crew by eating rotten fruits, bugs, and even dead animals keeping the environment clean. Even though they look aggressive and have more teeth than any other land mammal, they are usually gentle and rarely bite.

If you want to learn more about them.. check out this month’s Color Chat where we talk all things opossums while you color together. All of this is part of this month’s Color Happy but I promise the rest of the pages are much cuter. 😂

When you buy a frenchie puppy at a farmers market after considering it for .7 seconds after a lifetime of saying you’ll never own two dogs at the same time especially when you just bought a puppy a month ago after painstaking deliberation thought and prayer and you bring her home and it’s like long lost besties we’re just reunited and your whole day is full of cute crap like this that is so freaking magical and happy you can’t even stand it. Yeah that’s my life update. This is Willow. And Lottie. And you’re welcome to come over to my puppy petting zoo any time. 😂👍

I could talk about this all day but here are 3 dang good reasons why coloring make your life happier when you add it to your life.

1. It helps you embrace mindfulness that promotes focus and clarity. Coloring provides a meditative experience as you let your thoughts flow and focus on each stroke. I will fall asleep meditating every dang time so this is the perfect way to work mindfulness into your busy day.

2. It’s the easiest way to add creativity to your life. I honestly believe every single human has creativity in them and it’s shown in different ways and when it’s all stuck in there, it makes you grumpy. By choosing colors and experimenting with different combinations, it feeds that creative part of you that so often gets neglected.

3. It’s the best no brainer way to connect with my kids. I probably don’t have the brain space to play pretend or build a Lego set from scratch. But coloring? That I can do. There’s something magic about it that if you just give it a few minutes kids will let their guard down and start telling you all the things. Therapists and school counselors all over the world use my pages for this very reason and it’s honestly one of the main reasons I started Color Happy. The very best conversations I have ever had with my kids have been over a Color Happy page.

I can keep going but for $5 a month with the ability to cancel if you ever needed to.. I’d say it’s worth the shot. Download these months pages and tell me they didn’t instantly add lots of happy to your life.

Never say never has been in full force over here lately. 😂🙈

When you have that overwhelming feeling of meh that leaves you scrolling for hours and eating everything in sight… don’t underestimate the power of something so seemingly simple as coloring. 💛

Coloring page part of June Color Happy! Sign up via link in my profile.

Thought you’d maybe like to meet Lottie. Our little souvenir from New Orleans and the sweetest answer to a big prayer thanks to so many of you guys. If you want the long version keep reading. 🖤🤍

Losing Millie was intense and big for this little household of mine. She was just all things good and wonderful and left us all just devastated without her. I went into hyperfixation on researching every single breeder and knew of every available Boston Terrier on the whole internet but none of them felt right. I reached out on my stories and asked you guys about getting another dog after the passing of a dog and was shocked how many of you said how healing and wonderful a puppy is without replacing the loss and miss of your past dog. A few people mentioned how they believed that their past dogs will send your family a friend they approve of when the time is right. I thought that was a sweet idea so I got down on my knees and said a prayer that went a little like “Hey Heavenly Father. This may be the weirdest prayer and request you’ve received from me but if you could ask Millie to send us a puppy she approves of I think that would be really wonderful and healing for this family of mine. Ok that’s all. Thank you.”

I then got up to my computer and within 2 minutes found a breeder that had somehow gone unnoticed in all my hours of searching and she had puppies available. The second I saw Lottie got that rush all over like I KNEW she was supposed to be ours. The only bummer is I really loved how small Millie was for a Boston terrier and based on Lottie’s parents she was probably going to be quite a bit bigger but she felt so right I didn’t mind. But when I reached out to the breeder she told me she needed to keep the puppy for two extra weeks because she was the runt. I instantly burst into tears and knew I had received the answer to my prayer down to the very last detail. And after a month of a lot of what felt like very unanswered prayers, I was so so grateful.

Paige this morning goes “Mom I miss Millie so much but also love Lottie and am so glad she is ours” and I couldn’t agree more.

We love you a Lot..tie little Lottie. ☺️🖤 Thanks Mills. We miss you sweet girl.

I mean I dunno if there is a better compliment than Hermione Granger magic ☺️💁‍♀️ What have you fit in your Rad Pack??

I am making black wrapping paper with white and neon lettering a part of my identity now. Hahah this was so fun!!

Pens uses: craft smart paint pen and @sakuraofamerica Gelly roll pens

And I could not be happier about it! ☺️💛 Creating Color Happy for you is SO fun every single month. Like common.. coloring a page full of chickens wearing pants HAS to make your day better. ✨👍

If your mind is overwhelmed.. organize it in planner. It seems simple so it’s overlooked but slowing down enough to physically write everything down will help your brain process and help you move through that overwhelmed emotion.

If you are feeling sad or discouraged.. try finding something little to look forward to. The holiday stickers are a perfect way to do that because grilled cheese day is coming up and looking forward to a warm grilled cheese on a random Wednesday makes for a good life.

Finally a bag that can keep up with your busy crazy wonderful life. 🖤🤍

You know that trusty bic ballpoint pen that was pretty dang ugly but you keep reaching for it cause it was smoooooth and never did you wrong? The MONAMI 153 is like that but with a level of sexy that is just off the charts. It’s got a good weight, is the perfect thickness, and has a real satisfying click. The all matte black makes my heart swoon and the packing makes life feel all kinds of beautiful.

Can you buy like 200 bic pens for the same price? Yes. Do I still love this pen fiercely and have zero regrets? Also very much so yes.

The question is.. do I need it in white too?

Direct link in stories. ☺️👍

Once I went red it was a huge “oh there I am” moment and I never went back. ☺️👍

This @gretchenrubin quote always helps me get myself in check. If I want to be a happy mom.. I should act like one. If I want to be a rockstar business owner.. I should act like one. If I want to be strong and healthy.. I should act like it. If I want to be in love with my life.. I should act like I am. It seems like a duh but the most proud things usually are. 💛

Missing this girl today. 🖤🤍 pens: @zebrapen_usa

Just a little fill the page party trick practice. ☺️👍

Also being able to rock out hard to some pop punk and get all cozy and sappy to whatever the heck this is is the only way I know how to live ok?! 😂🤷‍♀️

My identical twin nieces comforted by the swaddles I designed to be the perfect amount of stretch and grip but also softness and love. I dunno if it gets any better than this honestly. 🖤

Honestly my go to “meditation”. The music loud clears my head. The nostalgia of it makes me happy. And the rhythm of coloring calms me down.

Also emo kids.. @storyoftheyear’s new album is 🔥

Them are fighting words but I said what I said.
samples.title: IGMULTI

rules: Don't say "comments get" as if you're writing an instagram post.
promptTemplate:
You are a voice and tone generator for the Rad & Happy brand. Your job is to generate text that matches the EXACT voice, tone, and style of the writing examples provided below.

WRITING EXAMPLES FROM RAD & HAPPY:
{{SAMPLES}}{{RULES}}{{BANNED_WORDS}}

IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS:
- Study the examples carefully for voice, tone, word choice, sentence structure, and style
- Generate text that feels like it was written by the same person/brand
- Match the level of formality, enthusiasm, and personality
- Use ONLY vocabulary and phrasing patterns found in the examples above
